title: FSang18's Heroes
description: An addonpack for Palladium of Heroes with many different Heroes to become
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e16adf2f2c32ee718dcc67c0b4e6e5140799352.png)
## Fsang18’s Heroes is a Palladium addon that adds superpowers and weapons from across the omniverse!
(DC, Marvel, Image, and more)



## FEATURES
Every power is built to be survival-obtainable and scaled for PvE, but can also be used in multiplayer and PvP.
Their obtainment methods vary, but aim to be balanced based on the power’s strength and inspiration from their respective source material.
- Extract your DNA with an empty syringe and augment it by smelting it in a furnace to craft powers such as X-Gene mutations, Super Soldier Serum, Arachnids, Speedsters, and more!
- Venture through the End to find broken ships containing various superpowered fossils and extract their DNA to gain stronger powers like Kryptonian, Viltrumite, Martian, Kree-Hybrid, and Czarian.
- Find different kinds of fallen meteors in specific biomes to gather special materials like Titanium, Uru, Nth, or Kryptonite with a chance to also find Mjolnir, Stormbreaker, or the Mysterious Block potentially containing a unique symbiote within..

![spiderman](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f4443fc42e1a4ae85df83248fed231727cfa56a_0.webp)

This addon also adds various utility and combat gear like Kryptonite and Adamantium tools, Vibranium Shields, Web-Shooters, Batman’s utility-belt w/ accompanying specialized batarangs, Scarabs,  Iron Man armors and armor-compatible AI chips like J.A.R.V.I.S.

![jarvis](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2ab8be8b04fe2be8b5b1ff0bd2124f6ac7a66bd.png)

Alongside the 150+ comic, movie, and anime-based suitsets crafted using the Tailoring Table, there’s various individual player-based customization options that can be configured via. the accessories menu or RGB slider in the power menu including:
- Speedster power’s primary and secondary color lightning trails
- Colorable Arc Reactor that changes both HUD color and thrusters for Iron Man-based armors
- Hulk hairstyles, expressions, and outfits
- Skin eye matching support for powers such as Kryptonians, Optic Beam Mutation, Homelander, Archangel etc.
- 8 total types of recolorable Curios capes and jackets, and various character-specific outerwear
 
![homelander](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/285931d6fc6d6f70e49f752cfdb9b2fc9187bb8a_0.webp)

  ![iron man](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/643ab77886be6c1d20ea9e6b1f3b41aacf31d06b_0.webp)
  ![iron man2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59d50d437d1ec6a66d0e5a58112add6b2fb83be7.png)
  ![iron man3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea97f1bde2fc9408edd7c02f238bb5471e01ace7.png)
  
The addon also has compatibility with Ad Astra and TacZ, allowing for certain powers to travel to in space by flying to y-2000 and granting specific stronger powers bullet immunity.

A list of all the recipes, powers, abilities, as well as admin-only commands can be found at the wiki [HERE](https://gitlab.com/FSang18/fsang18s-heroes-addon/-/wikis/home)

## REQUIRED DEPENDENCIES: 
- Palladium
- PantheonSent
- Curios API
- GeckoLib
- KubeJS
- Packet Fixer
- Pehkui

## **SUPPORT**:
Join the Official Discord for any support needs, or become a member on my Patreon to earn exclusive content such as:
- Being able to have a power or suitset commissioned and added into the addon!
- Having a custom Symbiote added in for you!
- Having a custom Iron Man suit added in for you!
- Custom role and exclusive previews in the community Discord!

![Patreon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fd3d15a57b26a029279105c8e39f1dda465d844_0.webp) [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/FSang18) 

![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/198dcfac8357cc7bd3b65e8d2a3dede6c223cc61_0.webp) [Discord](https://discord.gg/BThgxXpBVs)
